generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen, you remember when we could count on strong civil defense systems. Today, our leaders are cutting preparedness budgets while global threats grow. Don't let them gamble with our safety! The 2025 National Security Review shows that 78% of emergency responders feel unprepared - we need to demand better protection for our communities. #CivilDefenseMatters #SeniorsForSecurity
